description_long: This is a compact, boxy SUV with a dark blue exterior and a utilitarian design, featuring a flat roof and squared-off edges. The front end is equipped with a prominent grille, two rectangular headlights, and orange indicator lights on the fenders. The side profile reveals two passenger doors with flush handles, tinted windows, and black side mirrors. The rear of the vehicle has a single rear window with a wiper, small taillights, and a rear bumper with visible supports. The wheels are dark-colored with a five-spoke design, and the vehicle sits relatively high off the ground, suggesting off-road capability. The overall appearance is rugged and functional, suitable for both urban and light off-road environments.
description: A compact, boxy dark blue SUV with a rugged, utilitarian design, featuring five-spoke wheels and squared edges. It has tinted windows, prominent headlights, and a flat roof, giving it a sturdy and practical appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the grille, headlights, orange indicators, windshield wipers, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two doors, tinted windows, side mirror, and five-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rear window with wiper, taillights, and rear bumper supports.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing two doors, tinted windows, and five-spoke wheels.
